# FCEUmm provenance

- Upstream: https://github.com/libretro/libretro-fceumm
- Revision: `3a84a6fd0ba20dd4877c06b1d58741172148395f`
- License: GPL-2.0-only, retained in `LICENSE.txt`
- Source input: `fceumm-src` in the repository flake
- Integration: pinned libretro core statically linked into the Rust host

Local patches are applied in the order listed by `patches/series`.
